H. Wound Care Provided Within Scope of State Practice Acts 

If wound care falls within the auspice of a physical therapist's State Practice Act, then the 
physical therapist may provide the specific type of wound care services defined in the 
State Practice Act. However, such visits in this specific situation would be a covered 
therapy
